title: aira pulchella
intro: Aira pulchella, also known as the pretty bent or purple bent, is a type of grass native to Europe and Western Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Aira pulchella include reducing inflammation and relieving respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Aira pulchella can be prepared as an herbal tea by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water, or it can be used as a tincture by extracting the active compounds in a solvent.
